appName: Polling/Voting App with LMC Crypto Rewards
welcome: Welcome to the Polling/Voting App with LMC Crypto Rewards
landingDescription: LogikMeter is a web application that enables users to create, analyze, and discuss logical topics, vote on polls, and earn crypto rewards (LMC tokens) for participation. The platform leverages AI for topic analysis, supports versioned topics, and incentivizes engagement through a built-in wallet and reward system.
feature_ai_analysis_desc: Leverage advanced AI to analyze and structure your topics for deeper insights and better discussions.
feature_discussions_desc: Start or join real-time discussions, collaborate, and vote on logical topics with others.
feature_crypto_rewards_desc: Earn LMC tokens for participating in polls, discussions, and contributing to the community.
howItWorks_step1: Sign up and log in to your account.
howItWorks_step2: Create or explore logical topics and request AI analysis.
howItWorks_step3: Participate in polls and discussions to share your insights.
howItWorks_step4: Earn LMC crypto rewards for your engagement.
howItWorks_step5: Transfer or use your LMC tokens in the built-in wallet.
